summary: Tested Scan + Tactical integration (iteration 22). All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified successfully. Scan and Tactical tabs are connected - after scan prediction completes, it auto-fires tactical analysis. International context detection working correctly (Denmark query returns national team stats).
passed_tests: GET /api/cache/status returns valid counts (leagues=1225, teams=1158, players=23992, nationalTeams=485)
POST /api/tactical/start returns session_id and welcome message
POST /api/tactical/start welcome message has no Grok/Gemini branding
POST /api/tactical/message returns proper structure {response, session_id, scanEntries}
POST /api/tactical/message response has no Grok/Gemini branding
POST /api/tactical/message detects international context when Denmark is mentioned
POST /api/tactical/message returns substantial international analysis for national team queries
Frontend: 3-tab navigation (Scan, Tactical, Tracking) renders correctly
Frontend: Scan tab shows 'Scan a Prop' header with upload zone
Frontend: Tactical tab shows 'Reverse Tactical' header with 'Live Intelligence' label
Frontend: Tactical tab has camera button for image upload
Frontend: No 'Grok' or 'Gemini' text visible in any tab
critical_code_review_comments: tactical.py _is_international_context() correctly detects national teams via get_national_team_id()
tactical.py _fetch_player_stats_structured() separates INTERNATIONAL from CLUB stats and prioritizes based on context
tactical.py _fetch_data_for_props() is international-aware and fetches national team fixtures
App.js handleScanPredict() fires fireTactical() after prediction completes (lines 489-509)
App.js scanTactical state stores tactical analysis for display below ProjectionCard
Frontend correctly shows 'Live Intelligence' label instead of 'Grok + Gemini Dual Engine'
seed_data_creation: None - using existing MongoDB cache data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scan + Tactical integration verified. After scan prediction completes, it auto-fires tactical analysis and displays below the prediction card. International context detection working - queries mentioning national teams (e.g., Denmark) prioritize international stats over club stats. Backend tactical endpoints work with real Grok + Gemini APIs (15-30 second response time). No Grok/Gemini branding visible anywhere.

backend_changes._is_international_context: Checks if teams are national teams via get_national_team_id()
backend_changes._fetch_player_stats_structured: Separates INTL/CLUB stats, prioritizes based on is_intl flag
backend_changes._fetch_data_for_props: International-aware, fetches national team fixtures when is_intl=True
backend_changes._fetch_national_team_fixtures: Fetches last 5 fixtures for national teams

frontend_changes.fireTactical: Called after prediction completes in handleScanPredict() (lines 489-509)
frontend_changes.scanTactical_state: Stores tactical analysis response for display
frontend_changes.tactical_breakdown_section: Displays below ProjectionCard when scanTactical is set

international_context_test.query: What are Hojbjerg stats for Denmark?
international_context_test.result: Returns Denmark international stats (Friendlies 2025: 2 apps, 150 min, 85.5 passes/game)
